instruction: Reset the position of the small purple dot on the window icon. (very subtle — only 4px off).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/window.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M3 8.25V18a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25 2.25h13.5A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 21 18V8.25m-18 0V6a2.25 2.25 0 0 1 2.25-2.25h13.5A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 21 6v2.25m-18 0h18M5.25 6h.008v.008H5.25V6ZM7.5 6h.008v.008H7.5V6Zm2.25 0h.008v.008H9.75V6Z"/></g>
  <circle id="dot" fill="#a855f7" cx="20" cy="16" r="2" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/window.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M3 8.25V18a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25 2.25h13.5A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 21 18V8.25m-18 0V6a2.25 2.25 0 0 1 2.25-2.25h13.5A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 21 6v2.25m-18 0h18M5.25 6h.008v.008H5.25V6ZM7.5 6h.008v.008H7.5V6Zm2.25 0h.008v.008H9.75V6Z"/></g>
  <circle id="dot" fill="#a855f7" cx="16" cy="16" r="2" />
</svg>
